channel.title: Abouts on zvlfahmi's Personal Blog

item.title: About
item.description: Halo! My name is Zulfahmi Azka, i’m a 16yo hobbyist programmer from Indonesia. I’m currently studying in Islamic High School. I also sometime does photography. Github : zvlfahmi Discord : zvlfahmi
